stemHtml: Under unlawful interference with no special regional procedures, the PIC should fly at a level differing from normal IFR levels by…

options.a: 500 ft where a 1000 ft VSM applies, or 1000 ft where a 2000 ft VSM applies.
options.b: 500 ft for easterly tracks, or 1000 ft for westerly tracks.
options.c: 250 ft regardless of the local VSM.
options.d: 500 ft regardless of the local VSM.
